steps: "Submit IB 92 form to Belastingdienst requesting refund of excess Dutch withholding tax (25% vs 15% treaty rate)",
"Include documentation proving Norwegian tax residency and Unilever NV dividend payment details",
"Contact ABN AMRO Custody to verify they cannot process treaty relief at source for future payments",
"Follow up with Belastingdienst on refund status after 8-12 weeks processing period"

references.title: Belastingdienst – Recipient of Dividend Outside Netherlands – Refund
